description: A long metal object with a black handle on one end. The object looks like it could be a wrench or a screwdriver. It is silver in color and has a smooth, shiny surface. The handle on the end is black and appears to be made of rubber or plastic. There are two holes on the top of the object, one larger than the other. The background is white.
A large blue machine is inside of a building. There are lights hanging from the ceiling above the machine. There is a yellow pole next to the machine on the ground.

A silver and black device is sitting on a black base. The silver device has a silver top and black bottom. There are small black screws on the top of the silver device. There is black writing on the front of the device.

A picture of a pressure gauge. The pressure gauge is made of metal. The metal is silver. The dial on the gauge is white. The numbers on the dial are black. There is a small knob on the side of the gauge. There are black letters on the front of the dial. The background of the picture is plain white.
A black pen with a yellow stripe on it. There is a white tip on the tip of the pen. The black pen has a small knob on the end of it.

This is a picture of a machine. The machine is white and blue in color. There is a blue lid on the top of the machine. There are two black handles on either side of the blue lid. The wheels on the machine are black in color and they are rubber.
The image is of a fan. The fan is made of metal. The blades are tan in color. The center of the fan is silver. There is a small metal bolt in the center. The background is white.
This is a picture of a yellow and black power tool. The power tool has a black cord coming out of it. There is a black power plug next to the power tool on the ground.
This is an image of a forklift. The forklift is orange in color. It has black wheels on it. There is a black handle on the front of the fork lift.
A pipe wrench is shown on a white background. It is silver in color and has a red handle. It appears to be new and in good condition.
A picture of a pressure gauge. The pressure gauge is black and silver. The dial on the gauge is white. The numbers on the dial are black. There is a silver bar on the side of the gauge.

The image is of a dial indicator. It is silver in color and has a black handle on the top. The dial is round in shape and has black numbers on the face. It also has a silver screw on the side. Below the dial, there is a set of smaller dials.
A yellow and black power supply is sitting on a white surface. There is a black cord coming out of the power supply. There are two black clips on the side of the supply.
The image is of a metal cylinder. It is silver in color. It has a small hole at the bottom. It appears to be a part of a pen. The background is completely white.

The image is of a Bosch brand cordless drill. It is blue and black in color. The brand name is written in red on the top right of the image. The drill has a red trigger on the right side of the handle. There is a clear plastic cover on the bottom of the drill with the numbers 18V on it.

The image is of a pressure gauge. It has a black base and a white face. The face has red markings on the top and bottom. There are numbers on the face of the gauge. The numbers range from 0 to 10. There is a black needle at the bottom of the dial. The background of the image is white.
A black device has a green screen on it. There are red buttons under the screen. There is a silver zipper on the side of the device.
A hammer with a tan colored handle and a silver head. The head of the hammer is round and silver in color. The word on the handle is black. The hammer is standing upright on a white background.

The image is of a dial indicator. It is a type of measuring device used to measure the pressure of something. It has a black ring around the dial and a silver metal rod coming out from the side. The dial has black numbers on it. The word "INSIZE" is printed on the front of the dial. The background of the image is white.

A set of screwdrivers is on a black and red box. The screwdrivers are red and yellow in color. The box is rectangular in shape and has a red border around the edges. There is a screwdriver on the left side of the box.

The image is of a hand sanitizer. It is made of metal. It has a silver base and a black top. It also has two white stripes on it. The handle of the dispenser is long and thin. It appears to be made of plastic. The background is white.

This is an image of a hose. The hose is silver in color. The ends of the hose are black. There are two black knobs on the ends. The knobs have a small circular hole in the middle. The wire is coiled up. The background is white.

A set of tools is displayed on a white background. There is a silver and black item that says "EMSEAL" on the top. There are five items in front of the item that are black and silver. The items have wooden handles on the front and silver blades on the sides. There appears to be some type of tool with a black handle on the right side.
There are several electronic devices on a white surface. There is a black and silver caliper with a digital display on it. Next to it is a red and white ruler.
There are several white papers on top of each other. There are red and green stripes on the papers. There is black writing on the white papers.
A hair brush is on a white background. The brush has a wooden base and metal bristles. The bristles are black and silver in color.
A small plastic jar with a silver lid. The label on the jar is red and white. There is a small red sticker on the front of the jar.
A black tool case is open. Inside the case is a set of tools. The tools are silver in color. The case is made of plastic. The lid is open on top of the case.
A yellow and silver tool with a black handle. There are silver pieces in front of the tool. There is a silver piece with holes on it.

A set of pressure gauges and hoses is shown.  There is a black hose connected to a pressure gauge with a brass fitting.  The pressure gauge has a black face with white numbers and black hands.  A white hose is connected to the pressure gauge.  Two black hoses are on the left side of the hoses and one is on the right side.
A black and blue box is sitting on a white surface. There are silver tools inside of the box. There is a blue stripe on the side of the blue box.
A yellow object has a handle on it. There is a silver part on the front of the object. There are purple symbols on the side of the yellow object.
There are three brushes on a white background. The first brush has black bristles on it. The second brush has yellow bristles. The third brush has gray bristles and a black handle.

This is a picture of a machine. The machine is a lifting device. It is made of metal. The metal is gray. The top of the machine is yellow. There is a black handle on the machine. There are four wheels on the bottom. The background of the picture is white.
The image is a set of four screwdrivers. Each screwdriver has a black handle and a yellow tip. The size of the screwdrivers is 16.7cm/6.6in.
A yellow and black flashlight is on a white background. The flashlight has a black base. It has a handle on the top for easy carrying.

The image is of a tool. The tool is silver in color. There are eight blades in a fan shape. Each blade has 0.50 mm written on it in black letters. The blades are 0.15 mm in length. There is also 0.30 mm in width. At the bottom of the blades there is a silver tool with a small circular button on it.
A yellow crane is hanging from the ceiling in a warehouse. There are white walls behind the crane. There is a white light on the ceiling.

There are three screwdrivers on a white background. The screwdrivers are black and green in color. The green screwdrivers have a black handle. The black handles have a text on them. The text is black. The background is plain white.

The image is of a digital thermometer. The thermometer is red and yellow in color. The screen on the thermometer says 2730 in blue letters. There is a power button on the bottom right of the screen. There are buttons below the screen that say vel, store, and cal. The cord is black in color and is attached to the device.

This is a picture of a roller coaster. The roller coaster is made of metal. The metal is a bright blue color. There is a hinge on the top of the roller coaster to hold it in place. There are little holes in the middle of the circle. The background of the image is white.

Aarpee brand pressure gauge. It has a blue face and a silver ring around the base. There are numbers on the face of the gauge. There is a black bar at the top of the dial. There's a silver screw on the base for the gauge to be attached to. The brand name of the pressure gauge is printed on the front of the device.

The image is of a set of emergency medical supplies. There is a red box with a white cross on it. Next to the box is a helmet with goggles. The goggles are tinted blue. The helmet is red with a yellow stripe on the top. On the right side of the helmet is a white glove. The gloves are also white. On top of the red box is another red life vest. In front of the first aid kit is a pair of glasses.
A long silver stick with a black handle. There is a black knob on the end of the stick. The background is white.
A red metal tool is on a white background. It has a black handle on one end and a silver bar on the other end. It appears to be a vice.

The image is of two objects. The object on the right is gold in color and the one on the left is light pink in color. Both objects have long handles on either side of the gold object. The objects are outlined in black. The background of the image is white.
A black case with a green handle is open. Inside the case there are three bottles of different sizes. There is a black cord coming out of the case.
Two black shelves are attached to a silver pole. Each shelf has a yellow circle on it. The letters "S" and "M" are on the black shelves. Below the shelves is a black silhouette of a person.
There is a blue box next to a black container with a handle on it. There is a black cord coming out of the box and a small black phone next to the box.
A silver and black screwdriver is on a white background. The screwdriver has a black handle and a red stripe on the end of it. There is writing on the side of the screwdriver.
A blue electronic device is sitting on a white table. The device has a black screen on it. There is yellow writing on the screen. There are black buttons on the side of the device.

This is an image of a spray gun. The spray gun is gray in color. It has a black nozzle on the left side. It also has two orange connectors on the right side. The nozzle is gold in color and is connected to a black hose. The top of the spray can is black. The handle on the gun is black plastic.
A red plastic tool case is open. Inside the case are various tools such as wrenches, screwdrivers and nuts. The case has a handle on the top for easy carrying.
A machine is standing on a white background. The machine is gray in color and has a red roll of tape on top of it. There is a black part on the side of the machine.

The image is of a red and black tool kit. There is a black and red tool box with the words "Lockout Kit" written on it. Next to the box is a red tool kit that looks like a gun. There are two red tool boxes next to the tool kit as well as a red box that says "DANGER" on the front of it. The tool kit also includes a bunch of different types of locks.

A bottle of Loctite277. The bottle is red in color and has a white spray nozzle on top of it. The brand name of the product is written in white letters on the front of the bottle. There is also a small white symbol on the bottom of the red bottle.
This is a picture of a pump. The pump is made of metal. It is blue in color. There is a hose coming out of the pump. There are gauges on the pump that are used to measure the pressure.

A product called "Prestone Flush 'N Fill Kit" is shown in a package. The package is black and yellow and has the brand name of the product written in white on the top left corner. The product is called "flush 'n fill kit" and it says "Fits most cars & trucks". There is a picture of a yellow truck on the front of the package.

A diagram of a hydraulic jack is shown. It is red and yellow in color. It has a large cylinder at the bottom and a large pipe at the top. There is a handle on the right side of the handle. There are smaller cylinders on the left side and a ball valve on the bottom.
A large white machine is inside of a building. There is a black and yellow sign on the front of the machine. There are pipes coming out of the top of the building.

A red plastic tool box is open. It has a handle on the top for easy carrying. Inside the red plastic box is a set of 12 black sockets. Each socket has a hole in the middle for the sockets to be inserted into. The sockets are round and black in color. There is a small red button at the bottom of each socket.
A pair of pliers is shown. The pliers have red and yellow handles. The silver part of the pliers has a sharp point. The background of the image is white.

The image is of a metal tool. It appears to be a vice. It is silver in color. It has two black wheels on either side of it. There is a long metal bar at the top of the vice. There are two long metal rods at the bottom of the vise. The background of the image is white.

A digital meter is shown. The meter is yellow and black in color. There are three buttons on the front of the meter. There is a power button on the bottom right corner. The numbers on the meter are 8.88.8.

There are plastic objects on a white background. The plastic objects are blue and yellow. There is a screwdriver with a red handle and silver tips. There are small yellow objects next to the blue objects.
A large orange tarp is hanging from a building. There is a yellow hose on the ground in front of the tarp.

A picture of a blue spray gun. The handle of the spray gun is blue. The nozzle is silver. There is a black tip on the handle. There are ridges on the side of the handle for grip. The spray gun has a silver nozzle on the end of it. The background is white.
This is a picture of a tool. The tool is a jack. The jack is blue in color. The handle of the jack is black. The hook is silver. The background of the image is white.
A silver wrench is on a white background. The wrench has a long handle and a small opening at the bottom. There is writing on the side of the handle.

A black and silver tool is on a white background. The black part of the tool has a green part on the end. The silver part has black letters on it. There is a small silver button on the side of the black part.
A digital multimeter is sitting on a stand. The stand is orange and yellow. There are three wires connected to the multimeter. There is a yellow button on the top right corner of the meter.

The image is of a handheld thermometer. It is gray and yellow in color. It has a digital display on the front. The display shows the temperature as 230 degrees. There are buttons on the side for controlling the temperature. The background of the image is white.
A silver metal tool with a blue handle. There is a screw on the side of the tool. There are two silver tools next to the silver tool.

There are three magnifying glasses on a white background. The glasses have black handles with silver trim. The handles have a red stripe down the middle. There are two round mirrors on top of the glasses.
There are two pieces of machinery laying on the ground. There is a large piece of metal on top of a large pipe. There are small pieces of wood in front of the pipe.

The image is of a tool. The tool has a black body with a blue handle. On the black part of the tool there is a digital display. The display has white numbers on it. There are four small buttons on the side of the blue part. The brand name on the tool is written in white letters. The background of the image is white.

This is a picture of a power tool. The power tool is a drill. The drill is black and gray. The handle is yellow. The base of the drill is gray and black. The brand name on the base is gray. There are holes on the top and sides of the base. There is a screwdriver bit on the drill.
